## v0.2.1 — Security & Bug Patches

Dependency security updates and bug patch for the LoRa Wildfire Alert Network Dashboard.

### Bug Fixes

- **NodeCard double icon error** — when two alert conditions were simultaneously true, no icon would render; fixed in both `CardLongData` and `CardShortData`

### Security Updates

- **idna 3.15** (backend) — patch security advisory
- **webpack-dev-server 5.2.4** (docs-site) — patch security advisory
- **qs 6.15.2** (docs-site) — patch security advisory
- **express 4.22.2** (docs-site) — patch security advisory
- **brace-expansion 1.1.15** (frontend) — patch security advisory
- **brace-expansion 2.1.1** (frontend) — patch security advisory
- **js-cookie 3.0.7** (frontend) — patch security advisory
- **@clerk/shared 3.47.6** (frontend) — patch security advisory
